delegationBuilder.lockedAria: {{scope}} unavailable — the Agent does not hold it
delegationBuilder.lockedTitle: Agent doesn't have this — cannot grant
delegationBuilder.attemptPrompt: Sub-Agent presents the slip — attempt an action at the tool:
delegationBuilder.feedbackIdle: Narrow the slip down the chain, then attempt an action. Authority can only shrink — never grow.
delegationBuilder.feedbackAccept: ✓ "{{action}}" accepted — it is still in the final slip's scope, and the slip is stamped for calendar-api.
delegationBuilder.feedbackReject: ✗ "{{action}}" rejected — it was narrowed out of the slip. The Sub-Agent literally cannot do what it was never granted.

confusedDeputy.feedbackIdle: Set the slip, then fire the malicious "delete all records" instruction and watch the verifier.
confusedDeputy.feedbackExpired: ✓ Blocked. The slip has expired, so the verifier rejects it whatever the instruction. Short lifetimes cap the damage.
confusedDeputy.feedbackRevoked: ✓ Blocked. The slip was revoked, so the verifier rejects it immediately — access was cut before expiry.
confusedDeputy.feedbackDamage: ✗ Confused deputy! The over-broad slip granted "Delete records", so the verifier accepted the malicious instruction and the data was destroyed. The agent was tricked — its slip betrayed it.
confusedDeputy.feedbackBlocked: ✓ Blocked. The narrow slip never granted "Delete records", so even though the agent was tricked, the verifier refused. Tight scope is the defense.
